ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Common species name */,
  "brain_size_species_mean" REAL /* Mean brain size across species in cm³ */,
  "brain_size_female_mean" REAL /* Mean brain size of female specimens in cm³ */,
  "body_mass_male_mean" REAL /* Mean body mass of male specimens in grams */,
  "body_mass_female_mean" REAL /* Mean body mass of female specimens in grams */,
  "mass_dimorphism" REAL /* Mass dimorphism ratio between sexes */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., Endangered, Vulnerable) */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Primary habitat type of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "gestation_period" INTEGER /* Average gestation period of the species in days */,
  "litter_size" INTEGER /* Average number of offspring per litter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES genera ("genus_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family characteristics */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the family */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the family */,
  "ecological_role" TEXT /* Ecological role of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family to which the genus belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus characteristics */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the genus */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the genus */,
  "ecological_role" TEXT /* Ecological role of the genus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being measured */,
  "brain_size" REAL /* Brain size measurement in cm³ */,
  "body_mass_male" REAL /* Body mass measurement for male specimens in grams */,
  "body_mass_female" REAL /* Body mass measurement for female specimens in grams */,
  "mass_dimorphism" REAL /* Mass dimorphism ratio for the species */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used to calculate the measurements */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Primary research interests of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the consortium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study's objectives */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher leading the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Whether the results of the study have been published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study during which the observation was made */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the observation */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior observed (e.g., Feeding, Social Interaction) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the observation */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to any video footage of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location (e.g., habitat type) */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Habitat type at the location */,
  "last_visited_date" TEXT /* Last date the location was visited for a study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_locations" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being tracked */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the observation */,
  "observation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of observations at the location (e.g., Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "last_observed_date" TEXT /* Last date the species was observed at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
